chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 650 of 2023 Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 373 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 02.02.2024 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Learned Additional Prosecutor General submits that in this case the applicant has been acquitted. In view of above, these applications, having become infructuous, are accordingly disposed of. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E Abdul Basit
